rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Consider temperature effects on material properties.

description.short: Convert Brinell hardness (HB) to approximate Rockwell C (HRC) value.
description.long: Convert Brinell hardness (HB) to approximate Rockwell C (HRC) value.

short_i18n.en: Convert Brinell hardness (HB) to approximate Rockwell C (HRC) value.
short_i18n.tr: Brinell sertlik değerini (HB) yaklaşık Rockwell C (HRC) değerine dönüştürür.
short_i18n.de: Konvertieren Sie die Brinellhärte (HB) in einen ungefähren Rockwell-C-Wert (HRC).
short_i18n.fr: Convertir la dureté Brinell (HB) en valeur approximative Rockwell C (HRC).
short_i18n.es: Convertir dureza Brinell (HB) a valor aproximado de Rockwell C (HRC).
short_i18n.ar: حول صلابة برينل (HB) إلى قيمة روكويل C (HRC) تقريبية.
